categories.title: Theory
categories.purpose: Define privacy goals, predicate semantics, and the relation between AMT and ZK address claims.

categories.title: Specification
categories.purpose: Define commitments, nullifiers, public signals, proof bundles, verifier policy, and lifecycle.

categories.title: Implementation
categories.purpose: Point to executable models and tests that are safe to publish without private material.

categories.title: Applications
categories.purpose: Describe product use cases such as private delivery, hotel checks, POS, locker, and Web3 boundaries.

categories.title: Unverified Claims
categories.purpose: Keep open claims, external audit requirements, and unsafe wording out of canonical claims.

paperRoles.use: Japanese localized version of the canonical ZK address predicate paper.
Companion paper with additional explanation; do not treat as a second canonical source.
Derived Japanese explainer for AMT to ZK proof connection.
